playbooks.title: SSH Brute-Force Triage
playbooks.summary: Read-only workflow for investigating repeated SSH authentication failures.

steps.name: Review recent SSH logs
steps.goal: Find recent login attempts and service messages.

steps.name: Find failed password attempts
steps.goal: Identify brute-force indicators in auth logs.

steps.name: Review active sessions
steps.goal: Check who is currently logged in.

steps.name: Review recent login sources
steps.goal: Inspect recent sessions with source host details.

playbooks.title: Suspicious Process Triage
playbooks.summary: Read-only workflow for identifying unusual processes and network listeners.

steps.name: List network listeners
steps.goal: Find exposed services and owning processes.

steps.name: Map connections to processes
steps.goal: Correlate process IDs with network activity.

playbooks.title: Linux Persistence Review
playbooks.summary: Read-only workflow for reviewing common Linux persistence locations.

steps.name: List enabled services
steps.goal: Review services configured to start automatically.

steps.name: Show user crontab
steps.goal: Review current user's scheduled cron tasks.

playbooks.title: Container Security Review
playbooks.summary: Read-only workflow for Docker container inventory and risky configuration review.

steps.name: List running containers
steps.goal: Create a concise running container inventory.

steps.name: Inspect container
steps.goal: Review container mounts, environment, and networking.

steps.name: Check privileged mode
steps.goal: Identify containers running with host-level privileges.

playbooks.title: Kubernetes RBAC Review
playbooks.summary: Read-only workflow for reviewing Kubernetes access and cluster activity.

steps.name: Review effective permissions
steps.goal: List permissions for the current Kubernetes identity.
